news.t: Powering Up Your Portfolio: The AI-Driven LQAI ETF Arrives
Qraft Technologies Launches AI-Driven U.S. Large-Cap Core ETF In Collaboration with LG AI Research

holdings.infoBox: LQAI is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 7.35%, Micron Technology at 6.70%, NVIDIA at 5.83%, Tesla at 3.83%, and Intel at 3.65%.

overview.description: The LG QRAFT AI-Powered U.S. Large Cap Core ETF (LQAI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively manages a portfolio comprised of the top 100 large-cap US equities chosen with the aid of artificial intelligence. LQAI was launched on Nov 6, 2023 and is issued by Exchange Traded Concepts.
